diagrams.title: Cost of Quality Components
diagrams.description: Three interconnected circles showing Prevention, Appraisal, and Failure costs with arrows showing how investment in Prevention and Appraisal reduces Failure costs
elements: Arrows showing inverse relationship with failure costs
diagrams.purpose: Understand CoQ structure and cost reduction strategy

diagrams.title: Quality Integration in Project Lifecycle
diagrams.description: Horizontal flowchart showing project phases with quality gates
elements: Quality gates at each phase checkpoint
diagrams.purpose: Visualize quality activities across all project phases

diagrams.title: CMMI Maturity Levels Pyramid
diagrams.description: Five-level pyramid showing progression from Initial to Optimizing

diagrams.title: Defect Cost vs Detection Phase
diagrams.description: Exponential curve showing defect fixing cost increases as project progresses
elements: Y-axis: Cost to fix, X-axis: Project phase

visuals.title: The Place Of Software Quality In Project Planning
visuals.description: Visual diagram for the place of software quality in project planning
